evidence: E01 and E02 use the same central deceleration threshold family (3.4 m/s2, D_min 0.3s, merge 0.3s). E01 is currently guarded off, but once counterpart relation exists the same non-ego hard-deceleration interval can be both E01 and E02. E18 is differentiated centrally but broad high-band E18 can overlap ego E02 hard decel.
required_fix: Define cross-event hierarchy: collapse E01/E02 into one deceleration event with role qualifiers or mark E01 as an E02 subset; apply subset/precedence rules to E18 versus E02 before RQ012B.

evidence: Threshold rationale and read-scope audit state no IPV, official score, rank, team identity, label, agreement, event outcome, or event-IPV association was used; no data-derived threshold value was adopted.
required_fix: None for current artifacts; preserve B02 firewall for future threshold changes.

evidence: Pair extractor aligns world rows to nearest ego rows but does not reject duplicate/non-monotonic ego timestamps in the pair path. Red-team synthetic duplicate-ego-time probe emitted E09 event_count=1 with impossible_values=0 and missing_data_failures=0.
required_fix: Pre-validate ego time series before pair alignment; reject/deduplicate duplicate ego timestamps; add E09/E15 pair-alignment tests for duplicate/tied/mismatched time bases.

evidence: World rows are grouped by id or originId only; origin_id/name are stored but not used for stability checks. E09/E15 emit pair intervals for every world_by_actor key without verifying stable actor identity.
required_fix: Require stable id plus originId/name where available; split windows on identity changes; count actor-attribution failures per affected row/window; avoid primary use when unresolved.

evidence: Deduplication is per event only. E09 contact precedence uses fixed central_contact_tolerance=0.0, so high-band E15 tolerance 0.1 and high-band E09 distance 1.0 can both fire for same pair/time. Red-team probe at 0.05m clearance produced high E09=1 and high E15=1 for the same interval.
required_fix: Compute same-band E15 first and suppress E09 for same pair/time contact intervals; add cross-event duplicate audit for E09/E15, E01/E02, and E02/E18.

evidence: Corrected release zip has only four neutral text/CSV files and no forbidden-term hits, but issuance/release manifests still show UNSIGNED_PENDING_INDEPENDENT_REAUDIT and final neutral media/card issuance remains pending. Current proof covers text surfaces, not future media/card metadata.
required_fix: Before accepting labels, issue final neutral media/cards, rerun no-proxy/metadata checks, refresh support checksums, and replace unsigned auditor placeholders with signed re-audit; otherwise mark Gate 012-2 text-only.

evidence: Training package, key, and separation rule state training items are fictional, training-only, not formal items, and not derived from outcomes, prior annotations, automated output, or formal validation items.
